Title: Checkout without products
Steps:
1.Open SauceDemo
2.Login with valid credentials (standard_user / secret_sauce)
3.Navigate to Cart page
4.Click “Checkout” button
Expected result:
User should NOT be able to proceed to checkout
System should display a message like:
“Your cart is empty”
Actual result: User is allowed to proceed checkout without products in cart

Title: Quantity modification behavior
Steps:
Login to SauceDemo
Add any product to cart
Open Cart page
click on product quantity
Expected result: User shoul be able to decrease or increase quantity
Actual result: No option to modify quantity is available
